metadata.note: All per-language and per-difficulty DeepSeek results use the _deepseek suffix keys. All-model averages use the unprefixed keys. Figures 1/3/4/8 and Table 3 all use the _deepseek keys for the primary model results.

layer_ablation.note: Schema (L2) contributes the largest marginal gain; security (L3) critical at L4/L5.
